name: Set-PSResourceRepository

options.name: -ApiVersion
options.description: Specifies the API version used by the repository. Valid values are:

options.name: -CredentialInfo
options.description: A PSCredentialInfo object that includes the name of a vault and a secret that's stored in a Microsoft.PowerShell.SecretManagement store.

options.name: -Name
options.description: Specifies the name of the repository to be modified.

options.name: -PassThru
options.description: When specified, displays the successfully registered repository and its information.

options.name: -Priority
options.description: Specifies the priority ranking of the repository. Valid priority values range from 0 to 100. Lower values have a higher priority ranking. The default value is `50`.

options.name: -Repository
options.description: Specifies an array of hashtables that contain repository information. Use this parameter to register multiple repositories at once. Each hashtable can only have keys associated with parameters for the NameParameterSet .

options.name: -Trusted
options.description: Specifies whether the repository should be trusted.

options.name: -Uri
options.description: Specifies the location of the repository to be registered. The value must use one of the following URI schemas:

name: -Confirm
-cf
options.description: Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.

name: -WhatIf
-wi
options.description: Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet isn't run.

description: Sets information for a registered repository.
